title: lessertia acanthorhachis
intro: Lessertia acanthorhachis is a plant species native to Africa, also known as Acacia subuniflora, which is a type of shrub that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lessertia acanthorhachis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
